name: Petrack Park
description: Petrack Park is a place to play pickleball in Pahrump, NV. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and lights.

name: Wine Ridge RV Resort & Cottages!
description: Wine Ridge RV Resort & Cottages! is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Pahrump, NV. There are 2 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private.
